title: Rabbit's Immersive Optimizations
description: Brutally effective optimizations with almost zero noticeable drawbacks or bugs.
body:
Rabbit's Immersive Optimizations is a project I created with the intended purpose of giving everyone the insanely elevated Minecraft performance I have played with for several months now. Almost all of these mods I selected carefully, and with consideration into how unatural it could make the game feel; as a vanilla+ player, these mods will not be overwhelming or make the game feel heavily modded. However, this modpack is included with vanilla enhancing resourcepacks, shaders, new UI, and block remodels to create an immersive experience without being overbearing.

**The entire modpack can be used on a mutiplayer server as it only affects the user's client. Anyone can play this modpack on any online instance to gain a better performance.**
